tool.name: Invoke Axon Action
tool.description: Invoke a curated Axon-native control action by ID.

action_id.description: Action ID to invoke (e.g. open_chat, send_message).

ai.systemPromptSection:
### axon_invoke_action
Invoke a curated Axon-native action.

**Format:**
```tool_request
{"tool":"axon_invoke_action","query":"{\"action_id\":\"open_chat\",\"params\":{}}"}
```

Use `axon_discover_actions` first when action IDs are unknown.
whenToUse: Need semantic control over native Axon surfaces.
whenNotToUse: Action ID is speculative or unvalidated.
